title: auth refresh race
signal: 401 appears immediately after token refresh succeeds
decision: prefer refresh retry over timeout widening

title: search index lag
signal: new records are accepted but not visible in search
decision: wait for index catch-up before marking the incident solved

title: billing retry loop
signal: payment retries are duplicated after provider timeout
decision: dedupe provider retries by idempotency key

title: deploy rollback
signal: error rate rises only after the canary receives traffic
decision: rollback the canary before changing database state

title: feature flag exposure
signal: flag rollout leaks to the wrong cohort
decision: pin rollout scope to the beta cohort

title: migration checksum
signal: checksum differs between source and migrated rows
decision: pause rollout until the checksum mismatch is explained

title: cache invalidation
signal: stale reads continue after the write path succeeds
decision: invalidate the product cache after commit acknowledgement

title: webhook dedupe
signal: duplicate webhook deliveries create repeated side effects
decision: persist delivery ids before applying side effects

title: CI flaky test isolation
signal: test fails only when executed after the browser suite

title: support escalation SLA
signal: escalation timer is not reset after human handoff
decision: reset the SLA clock at handoff confirmation

title: recommendation model drift
signal: ranking quality drops after fresh catalog ingestion

title: warehouse stock sync
signal: stock reservation arrives before the inventory snapshot

title: rate limit policy
signal: burst traffic triggers global throttling for one tenant
decision: apply tenant-local throttling before global throttling

title: session timeout
signal: active users are logged out during token rotation

title: report export
signal: large report exports complete without the final manifest
decision: write the manifest only after all chunks are confirmed

title: email bounce processing
signal: hard bounces are retried as transient failures
decision: classify hard bounces before scheduling retries

title: quota metering
signal: usage is counted twice across the hourly boundary
decision: dedupe metering windows by event id

title: artifact retention
signal: build artifacts expire before audit export completes
decision: extend retention until audit export is sealed
